name: BCI Minerals Limited
description: BCI Minerals Limited is an Australian-based mineral resources company focused on developing an industrial minerals business, with its lead asset being the 100% owned Mardie Salt and Potash Project located on the Pilbara coast in Western Australia. The project is designed to produce high-purity salt and sulphate of potash (SOP) from seawater via solar evaporation. Additionally, BCI holds a portfolio of iron ore assets, including the Iron Valley mine operated by Mineral Resources Limited, which provides royalty earnings to support its development projects.
